item_text: if login is successful, user receives login result from server
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: user successfully logs in module: login source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" into the username field. 2. user enters "testpassword" into the password field. 3. user clicks the login button. 4. server receives the login request. 5. server verifies the credentials. 6. server sends a success message to the user. expected result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

item_text: if login is unsuccessful, user receives error message from server
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-002 title: user fails to log in due to invalid credentials module: login source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user has an invalid username or password. test data: - username: wronguser - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. user enters "wronguser" into the username field. 2. user enters "wrongpassword" into the password field. 3. user clicks the login button. 4. server receives the login request. 5. server verifies the credentials. 6. server sends an error message to the user. expected result: user is not logged in and sees an error message.
